system.description: A home-made mechanical arm with a powerful pincer claw, created by Frank Browne to replace the arm and leg he lost during the catastrophic mine collapse. This ingenious device has multiple functions: the pincer can crush with enough force to inflict severe wounds, and it features a built-in pulley system that can launch from the arm to raise or lower Frank about thirty feet, carrying up to two additional people. The mechanical arm is a testament to Frank's determination and his role as the strongarm of the Pig Heads gang.
